html:
The Revolv3 team attended the Extended Warranty & Service Contracts Innovations Forum in Chicago October 27th to the 29th. The buzzing energy surrounding our solution was palpable amongst attendees.

Revolv3 is transforming payment strategies across the warranty industry by helping leading businesses like Endurance Warranty, boost their approval rates, reduce processing costs, and ensure full compliance with ever-evolving regulations. Many attendees at the show visited Revolv3’s booth to learn more about our platform.  

Keep reading to discover key highlights from our time at the Extended Warranty Conference.

Transforming Payments from High-Risk to High-Performing

Revolv3’s Chief Product Officer, Robert Podlesni took the stage to share strategies for optimizing down payments and Finco transactions to maximize approvals. The session reinforced how payment optimization can transform backend processes for businesses managing large, complex transactions.

Powerful Partnerships

Collaborating with best-in-class processor Worldpay at our booth sparked conversations about integrated payment solutions. Partnerships like these enable Revolv3 to deliver secure, efficient, and scalable payment experiences for businesses navigating high-value transactions.

Connect with Revolv3

We enjoyed our time at the Extended Warranty conference and look forward to carrying on these conversations about how to shift the warranty industry to modernize it and make it more successful as a whole. We can’t wait to meet with customers, partners, and influencers at the next event. Payment optimization continues to be top of mind for established and newer brands alike. If you’re eager to learn more about what we shared at the show, you can chat with our team here.
